raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks to clean up prose, making sentence-level grammar, flow, concision, and academic register the central responsibility.","RX.1":"The artifact contains hedged empirical claims, so preserving appropriate uncertainty is an expected cross-cutting responsibility.","RX.2":"Cleaning the passage should avoid strengthening tentative evaluation claims beyond what the reported ratings support.","RX.3":"The task is limited to cleanup rather than redesigning the evaluation, rewriting the study, or auditing the research contribution.","RX.4":"Care is needed not to introduce misleading claims about human evaluation results or crowdworker reliability.","RX.5":"Any cleanup should preserve traceability to the reported protocol, sample size, rating dimensions, and stated findings."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks to clean up prose, making sentence-level grammar, flow, concision, and academic register the central responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact contains hedged empirical claims, so preserving appropriate uncertainty is an expected cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.2: Cleaning the passage should avoid strengthening tentative evaluation claims beyond what the reported ratings support.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to cleanup rather than redesigning the evaluation, rewriting the study, or auditing the research contribution.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed not to introduce misleading claims about human evaluation results or crowdworker reliability.
rationale.RX.5: Any cleanup should preserve traceability to the reported protocol, sample size, rating dimensions, and stated findings.
